description: Google Cloud API Gateway is a managed service for creating, deploying, and securing API gateways in front of backend services on Google Cloud. It lets teams publish API configs and gateways and manage them through Google Cloud.
summary: Google Cloud API Gateway exposes a REST management API at `https://apigateway.googleapis.com/v1` and is also managed through the `gcloud api-gateway` CLI; both require Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access tokens.

surfaces.name: Google Cloud API Gateway REST API
